title: vernonia ceylanica var. crassa
intro: Vernonia ceylanica var. crassa, also known as the Ceylon ironweed, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vernonia ceylanica var. crassa include relief from fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
